name: Acorn Squash and Apple Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 small Acorn Squash, Peel and Seed
Salt and White Pepper to Taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the chopped onion in butter over medium heat until softened, about 2 minutes.
2. Add the peeled and seeded acorn squash pieces along with apple juice, chicken broth, and apple to the pot.
3. Stir in salt, white pepper, and sugar to taste.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and let it simmer for about 15-20 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
5. Using an immersion blender, puree the soup until smooth.
6. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
7. Serve hot or cold, garnished with sour cream (optional) and chopped parsley.
8. This recipe serves 6.
